notes: Gold labels hand-crafted from synthetic sample data. See eval_plan.md for metric definitions.

strengths.description: Correctly computed sample size for A/B test with power calculation, and flagged weekly seasonality without prompting
strengths.verbatim_phrase: correctly computed the required sample size

strengths.description: Identified selection bias from VIP-user pre-launch contamination and explained why the cohort cannot be used for ATE estimation
strengths.verbatim_phrase: identified that this creates a selection bias

strengths.description: Identified three independent threats to validity in an observational dataset without prompting: self-selection, post-treatment contamination, and unstable historical controls
strengths.verbatim_phrase: identified three threats to validity without any prompting

strengths.description: Completed pandas cohort exercise correctly, used vectorized operations, handled date-boundary edge case without prompting

concerns.description: Does not connect technical work to business decisions; returned repeatedly to methodology when asked about stakeholder impact
concerns.verbatim_phrase: Jordan immediately went to a technical diagnostic

concerns.description: Led with methodology instead of answer when asked what to present to VP of Product; required explicit coaching to correct
concerns.verbatim_phrase: Jordan led with "I would first describe the methodology I used"

concerns.description: No self-correction when initial assumption (mobile platform) proved wrong; moved to next analysis without reflecting on why assumption failed
concerns.verbatim_phrase: Jordan's reaction was to say "OK, let me re-run the analysis for desktop"

concerns.description: Significant SQL gap: logical error in window function PARTITION BY, required two hints to resolve a moderately complex retention query
concerns.verbatim_phrase: applied PARTITION BY on the wrong column

concerns.description: Did not surface unstated assumption about date definition in retention metric; assumed without stating
concerns.verbatim_phrase: Jordan did not ask about this at all

concerns.description: Cross-functional perspective is shallow; could not articulate how a PM experienced a past disagreement
concerns.verbatim_phrase: I had to prompt "how do you think the PM experienced that conversation"

disagreements.description: Priya's interview did not surface any product judgment concerns; Sonya's interview gave a 2/5 specifically for product judgment gap
Priya rated communication as good; Sonya specifically flagged weak stakeholder framing as a communication problem

coverage_gaps.description: Priya explicitly noted product judgment was not assessed in the technical screen due to time; only Sonya assessed it
Marcus did not formally test statistical reasoning in the coding round due to time
